error_signature: Only the following file types are allowed: text/csv
title: CSV import fails with file type error
symptom: When attempting to import a CSV file, n8n displays an error stating 'Only the following file types are allowed: text/csv'. This occurs specifically for Member accounts.
root_cause: The issue seems to be related to browser compatibility, where certain browsers may not correctly handle the file type validation for CSV imports when logged in as a Member account. This can lead to a '400 Bad Request' error.
fix_steps: Switch to a different browser, preferably Chrome
Log in to the Member account
Attempt to import the CSV file again
agent_instruction: Try importing the CSV file using Chrome while logged in as a Member account.
